heading: Full faith and credit to tribal actions under tribal ordinances limiting descent and distribution of trust or restricted or controlled lands
label: 2207 Full faith and credit to tribal actions under tribal ordinances limiting descent and distribution of trust or restricted or controlled lands
text: The Secretary in carrying out his responsibility to regulate the descent and distribution of trust lands under , and other laws, shall give full faith and credit to any tribal actions taken pursuant to subsections (a) and (b) of , which provision shall apply only to estates of decedent’s whose deaths occur on or after the effective date of tribal ordinances adopted pursuant to this chapter.section 372 of this titlesection 2205 of this title
notes: Amendments2000— substituted “subsections (a) and (b) of section 2205” for “section 2205”.Pub. L. 106–462
amendments: Amendments2000— substituted “subsections (a) and (b) of section 2205” for “section 2205”.Pub. L. 106–462
